prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约1447名、1509名、1851名、1941名、1454名。2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势（从1447名后移至1941名），但2025年大幅回升 至1454名，较2024年跃升约487名，属于异常大幅波动，2026年存在回调压力；2021–2025年物理类计划人数分别为59、65、65、63、64人，2026年计划增 至71人，较2025年扩招约10.9%，扩招幅度较大，有利于降低竞争烈度，对位次有下移（更易进）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985、211、双一流高校，2025年及2026年软 科中国大学主榜均排名第8位，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生持续具有强吸引力；2026年高考周期内武汉大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德师 风、学校管理等多起舆情事件（99条事件中负面64条），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；但抖音热度排名第19（高热），短视频曝光量大，关注度仍处高位，两者形成对 冲；法学A+、马克思主义理论A+、测绘科学与技术A+、地球物理学A+、口腔医学A-、计算机科学与技术A-、新闻传播学A-、数学A-等，A-及以上学科超过10个， 学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、口腔医学等专业均为高热推荐，与武大优势学科高度 重合，吸引高分考生报考；本省2026年物理类考生约13.8万人，较2025年13.9万人略降约1%，竞争压力基本持平，本科批2025年425分，近年波动不大；武汉大学位于湖北武汉，与重庆同属中西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在重庆招生规模较大（物理类60余人），属重点生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异 常回升后的回调压力、2026年大幅扩招约10.9%的缓解作用、声誉偏负面与抖音高热并存的对冲效应，以及考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准145 4名基础上略有后移，预测最低位次约1519名，区间1346–1692名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1519名，区间1346–1692名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主攻方向、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如1300名以内）可重点冲击一档弘毅班、计算机、 口腔等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如1650名以外）应以三档工科试验班为主，兼顾二档部分专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1447, 1509, 1851, 1941, and 1454 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a gradual backward trend (from 1447 to 1941), but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 1454, a jump of about 487 places from 2024, indicating an abnormal large fluctuation, with downward pressure in 2026. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 59, 65, 65, 63, and 64 respectively. In 2026, the plan increases to 71, an expansion of about 10.9% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, helping to reduce competition intensity and potentially lower the ranking (making it easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In both 2025 and 2026, it ranked 8th in the main ranking of Shanghai Ranking's Chinese universities, firmly among the top universities nationwide, continuously attracting high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Wuhan University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving multiple public opinion incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, and school management (64 negative out of 99 incidents), which may somewhat suppress some students' willingness to apply. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with large short video exposure and still high attention, forming a counterbalance. With A+ in Law, Marxist Theory, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, and Geophysics, A- in Stomatology, Computer Science and Technology, Journalism and Communication, and Mathematics, and more than 10 disciplines rated A- or above, its academic strength is formidable, continuously attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Stomatology are all highly recommended, highly overlapping with Wuhan University's advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring students. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is about 138,000, a slight decrease of about 1% from 139,000 in 2025, keeping competition pressure basically flat. The undergraduate batch cutoff in 2025 was 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the same central-western region as Chongqing, with moderate regional preference. The university enrolls a relatively large number of students in Chongqing (over 60 in Physics Category), making it a key source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the downward pressure after the abnormal rebound in 2025 rankings, the mitigating effect of a significant enrollment expansion of about 10.9% in 2026, the counterbalancing effect of negative reputation and high Douyin heat, and the basically stable number of examinees, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 1454, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1519, and a range of 1346 to 1692.

- Science Experimental Class (Hongyi Academy/Hongyi Dual Degree Experimental Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1519, range 1346–1692. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1300), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 top majors like Hongyi Class, Computer Science, and Stomatology. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 1650), you should mainly consider Tier 3 Engineering Experimental Classes, while also considering some Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约262名、235名、306名、288名、347名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年位次347名为近五年最高（最差），较2024年288名后 移约59名，后移趋势明显；2021–2025年历史类计划人数分别为23、24、25、25、23人，2026年计划减至21人，较2025年缩招约8.7%，缩招将加剧竞争， 推动位次后移（更难进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜第8名，综合实力顶尖，对历史类高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年 高考周期内声誉偏负面，多起舆情事件可能抑制部分考生报考热情；但抖音热度排名第19（高热），整体关注度仍高，两者相互抵消；法学A+、马克思主义理论 A+、中国语言文学A、新闻传播学A-、理论经济学A-、应用经济学A-等，人文社科实力突出，对历史类考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学为分化观望（热度仍较高 ），新闻传播学为明显劝退，中国语言文学为推荐；本省2026年历史类考生约7.1万人，较2025年7.3万人略降约3%，竞争压力略有缓解；省控线本科批2025年438分，近年呈小幅 上升趋势；武汉大学位于湖北武汉，与重庆同属中西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在重庆历史类招生约20余人，属正常规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次 已处近五年最高点的后移压力、2026年缩招约8.7%的加剧竞争作用、声誉偏负面与抖音高热并存、以及历史类考生略减等因素，预计2026年历史类最低位次在2025年基准347名基 础上继续小幅后移，预测最低位次约349名，区间299–399名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 262, 235, 306, 288, and 347 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 ranking of 347 is the highest (worst) in the past five years, moving back about 59 places compared to the 2024 ranking of 288, indicating a clear backward trend. The planned enrollment numbers for History Category from 2021 to 2025 were 23, 24, 25, 25, and 23 respectively. In 2026, the plan reduces to 21, a decrease of about 8.7% compared to 2025. This reduction will intensify competition, pushing the ranking further back (making it harder to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 8th on the Soft Science main list. Its comprehensive strength is top-tier, maintaining strong appeal for high-scoring History Category students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation is slightly negative, with multiple public opinion incidents potentially dampening some students' enthusiasm for applying. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), and overall attention remains high, with the two factors offsetting each other. It has A+ in Law, A+ in Marxist Theory, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A- in Journalism and Communication, A- in Theoretical Economics, and A- in Applied Economics, showcasing outstanding humanities and social sciences strength, which strongly attracts History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a wait-and-see state of polarization (still relatively popular), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Chinese Language and Literature is recommended. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is about 71,000, a slight decrease of about 3% from 73,000 in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. The provincial control line for undergraduate batch in 2025 is 438 points, showing a slight upward trend in recent years. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which, like Chongqing, belongs to the central and western regions, with moderate regional preference. The university enrolls about 20-plus students in History Category in Chongqing, which is a normal scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward pressure from the 2025 ranking being at the highest point in the past five years, the intensified competition due to an 8.7% enrollment reduction in 2026, the coexistence of slightly negative reputation and high Douyin heat, and a slight decrease in History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will continue to move back slightly from the 2025 baseline of 347. The predicted minimum ranking is about 349, with a range of 299–399.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 349, with a range of 299–399. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 290), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Law and Hongyi College. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., outside 390), use Tier 3 Foreign Language and Literature as a safety, and target Tier 2 Journalism and Communication and Public Administration as main directions.
